title: Pup Go 2-Pack Wild Animal & SeaWorld Torch and Projector for Kids Ages 3 4 5 6 7 Years Old, 6 Discs and 48 Images, Ideal Toys for Boys, Cool Kids Torch, Educational Science Kits for Toddlers and Child
features: 🌟【What is this】This is a Kids Play Torch and Wall Projector. A magical children's toy that projects vibrant color images onto walls and ceilings in dark rooms, immersing children in enchanting worlds of nature and science. Ideal for kids ages 3 4 5 6 7+, including toys for 3 year old boys, toys for 4 year old girls, and gifts for 5+ year old boys and girls.

🚀【How to use】Simply power on the projector, aim it at walls or ceilings, insert a disc, and rotate it to discover 24 captivating images for each theme. Adjust the lens to sharpen and clarify visuals, creating vivid, crisp projections that spark curiosity and interactive play! Perfect for homeschooling science projects.

🌌【Diverse Themes】With 9 captivating themes—Dinosaur, Sea World, Outer Space, Animal, Mermaid, Unicorn, and more—this torch projector unlocks endless discovery. Each theme includes 3 discs, offering a total of 24 vivid images that inspire curiosity. It ignites children's passion for science and nature, making learning an exciting adventure!

🔦 Doubles as a Flashlight】More than just a projector—its built-in flashlight is perfect outdoor toys for kids, nighttime expeditions, or searching for toys in the dark. Whether for camping, backyard explorations, or bedtime story projections, this dual-function torch combines practicality with imagination! Great for toys for autistic children and sensory play.

🎁【Perfect gifts】A thoughtful gifts choice for boys and girls ages 3 4 5 6 7 +, and kids of all ages who love interactive toys. It's the perfect educational toy for boys' and girls' birthday presents, stocking fillers, end of term gifts for children, and holiday surprises, sparking interactive play as kids discover science, nature, and imagination together.
description: Product description Features Fantastic Projector Torch This is a Pocket-sized torch and projector Toy for 3+ years old kids. It can project images up to one meter wide on wall and ceiling. The fantastic projector torch brings Nature, Sea World, Dinosaur, Outer Space, Mermaid, Unicorn and more into your bedroom, so it is also a fun bedtime toy . Diverse Themes Full family projector contains a lot of themes, each of which includes 24 fascinating images. Dinosaur: 24 dinosaur images including Tyrannosaurus, Pterosaur, Giant Dragon, Triceratop, etc. Outer Space: 24 space exploration images including Astronaut, Space Shuttle, Planet, Nebulae, etc. Wild Animals: 24 wild animal images including Tiger, Wolf, Lion, Panda, Zebra and Elephant, etc. Sea World: 24 marine animal images including Dolphin, Penguin, Polar Bear, Shark, Walrus, etc. Mermaid: 24 little mermaid images, let your kids enter the lovely fairy tale world. Unicorn: 24 unicorn images including Majestic Unicorns, Enchanted Forests, and Magical Castles, etc. Children Love it The aim of the STEM toy is to entertain children and stimulate children's curiosity to know the world, and encourage them to explore and develop enthusiasm for these subjects. It's a great gift for early education and bedtime story. Creates Wonderful Parent-Child Time This projector torch is not just a fun toy; it's also a perfect tool for creating wonderful parent-child moments. Whether exploring the magical world of projected images together or telling bedtime stories based on the images, this projector enhances interaction between parents and children, making your time together more warm and meaningful. Specification Age: 3+ Material: Non-toxic ABS Plastic Battery: 2 x AA Batteries (Not Included) Torch Size: 14 x 3.5 cm/5.5 x 1.4 in Weight: 60 g/0.1 lb Package Include 2 x Projector Torch 6 x Discs (48 Images) Safety Warning WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD - Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Stimulate curiosity and learning about different topics through interactive play.
